inputs.label: Fabric Width
inputs.businessContext: Enter the width of the fabric panel in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the width of the fabric panel in centimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kumaş panelinin genişliğini santimetre cinsinden girin.

inputs.label: Fabric Length
inputs.businessContext: Enter the length of the fabric panel in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the length of the fabric panel in centimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kumaş panelinin uzunluğunu santimetre cinsinden girin.

inputs.label: Stitch Gauge
inputs.businessContext: Enter the number of stitches per centimeter in the width direction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the number of stitches per centimeter in the width direction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Genişlik yönünde santimetre başına düşen dikiş sayısını girin.

inputs.label: Row Gauge
inputs.businessContext: Enter the number of rows per centimeter in the length direction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the number of rows per centimeter in the length direction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uzunluk yönünde santimetre başına düşen sıra sayısını girin.

inputs.label: Yarn per Stitch
inputs.businessContext: Enter the length of yarn consumed per stitch in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the length of yarn consumed per stitch in centimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dikiş başına tüketilen iplik uzunluğunu santimetre cinsinden girin.

inputs.label: Yarn Linear Density
inputs.businessContext: Enter the yarn linear density in tex (grams per 1000 meters).

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the yarn linear density in tex (grams per 1000 meters).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İplik doğrusal yoğunluğunu tex cinsinden girin (1000 metre başına gram).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
